meta.title: For Partners & Sponsors | PADEL2GO – Visibility right at the court
meta.description: Reach active, sporty communities right where they spend their quality time — on the padel court, in the app, and at events.

hero.description: Reach active, high-spending communities exactly where they spend their quality time — on the padel court, in the app, and at events.

touchpoints.description: Physically at the court, digitally in the app, and live at events.

useCases.description: From equipment brands to lifestyle labels.

items.title: Sports retail & equipment
items.description: Rackets, balls, grips & bags as standard rewards in the P2G Rewards Store and as merchandise at our locations.

items.title: Nutrition & supplements
items.description: Recovery drinks, bars & supplements in vending machines, as event sampling, and as rewards.

items.title: Beverage brands
items.description: Pop-up event branding, court branding, sponsored open-play nights, league finals.

items.title: Lifestyle brands
items.description: Co-branded capsule collections, tournament series, social-content series around padel & lifestyle.

items.label: Customer retention
items.desc: Return rate driven by gamification & community

items.label: Players worldwide

whatsapp.title: Write to us –
whatsapp.intro: Instead of forms or scheduling tools: send us a short message via WhatsApp. We'll explore together how PADEL2GO fits into your brand strategy and arrange a meeting that suits — fast and non-binding.
whatsapp.message: Hi PADEL2GO team, we're interested in a partnership and would like to arrange a non-binding meeting.
